R0201.title: Account Abstraction Wallet Risk
R0201.definition: Account abstraction standards like ERC-4337 introduce new attack surfaces including UserOperation validation bypass, Paymaster abuse, and malicious aggregators.
R0201.description: Account abstraction standards like ERC-4337 introduce new attack surfaces including UserOperation validation bypass, Paymaster abuse, and malicious aggregators.
R0201.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
